untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit trendline definition and safety_zone_width parameters which are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Trendline construction method is not specified in source text. Implementation uses SMA_20 as trendline proxy and Bollinger Bands as safety zone proxy, but this is a reasonable interpretation rather than the exact signal intent.
translation_notes: Since trendline_definition and safety_zone_width are AUTHOR_SILENT, this uses SMA_20 as a trend-following trendline and Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower) as the safety zone/band around price movement. Entry requires price crossing the moving average AND being within the band structure. Exit uses reversal through the trendline as a reasonable stop condition per Rule 8.
